arts.ttl: Espanyol vs. Barcelona: Pau Cubarsi injury update provided after training-ground scare
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick confirms that central defender Pau Cubarsi is available for Thursday's La Liga clash with Espanyol.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick provides double Barcelona fitness update before Espanyol clash
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has provided updates on the wellbeing of two leading members of his squad. This of course comes ahead of the Blaugrana’s return to action tomorrow…

arts.ttl: Barcelona to field new centre-back partnership vs Espanyol
arts.sum: The coaching staff at La Liga leaders Barcelona are expected to make use of a new-look central defensive partnership in the club’s next outing. That’s according to Diario Sport, who…

arts.ttl: Barcelona lineup vs. Espanyol: Predicted XI for La Liga clash with Hansi Flick set to choose Inigo Martinez replacement
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Barcelona could line up for Thursday's La Liga clash with Espanyol at the RCDE Stadium.
